scope.summary: Add bounded Loom models for shipping-spool shutdown, admission permits, switch-at-capacity, and lane lock order, prove sensitivity to injected ordering bugs, and broaden fuzz coverage with audit-chain and OAuth-token targets plus seed corpora.
out_of_scope: Replacing parking_lot and real file I/O in production with Loom primitives; the tests are reviewed mirror models of those synchronization skeletons.
A long-running or continuously scheduled fuzz campaign; this bead adds targets, seed corpora, CI compilation, and bounded local smoke campaigns.
Claiming an external GitHub Actions run or a required-proof/v1 artifact.

entry_points.name: weekly and manual Loom invariant workflow
entry_points.trace: .github/workflows/loom.yml runs all three H6 test targets with LOOM_MAX_PREEMPTIONS=3, RUSTFLAGS=--cfg loom, two Cargo jobs, per-target result capture, a 30-minute job timeout, and an uploaded oraclemcp.loom-invariant-results/v1 contract.

entry_points.name: shipping-spool lost-wakeup sensitivity
entry_points.trace: LOOM_MAX_PREEMPTIONS=3 RUSTFLAGS=--cfg loom cargo +nightly-2026-05-11 test -p oraclemcp-audit --test loom_shipping_spool --release -- --test-threads=1 passed 4/4 in 37.23s including the child-process proof that the pre-fix store-plus-notify shape deadlocks while the mutex-bridged fix always exits.

entry_points.name: admission and lane lock-order sensitivity
entry_points.trace: The matching bounded Loom commands passed admission 4/4 in 277.17s and lane lock order 2/2 in 2.00s, including the injected check/admit TOCTOU cap overshoot and the injected Registry-to-Lifecycle AB-BA deadlock detectors.

entry_points.name: audit-chain fuzz target
entry_points.trace: cargo +nightly-2026-05-11 fuzz run chain_verify against a copy of all 5 committed seeds completed 200/200 sanitizer-instrumented runs without a crash in 48.15s; the target exercises streaming verify_reader and buffered parse_jsonl plus verify_records.

entry_points.name: OAuth-token fuzz target
entry_points.trace: cargo +nightly-2026-05-11 fuzz run oauth_token_validate against a copy of all 5 committed seeds completed 200/200 sanitizer-instrumented runs without a crash in 152.86s; the target exercises raw JWT validation and bearer extraction followed by validation.

entry_points.name: repository contract gates
entry_points.trace: cargo fmt --all -- --check, scripts/ci_taxonomy.py --check, scripts/ci_taxonomy.py --check-fixtures, scripts/oraclemcp_concurrency_lint.sh, git diff --check, and scripts/secret_scan.sh all passed in this evidence worktree.

limitations: The bounded local execution proves the scoped models and 200-run fuzz smokes at source b6bed9d; it does not claim that the weekly GitHub-hosted workflow has run at that exact SHA.

Loom cannot instrument parking_lot mutexes, std threads, or real file I/O, so the concurrency tests deliberately mirror the reviewed production synchronization skeleton and must change when that skeleton changes.
No full required-proof/v1 document was produced, so readiness remains not-ready on scoped-test evidence.
